children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, and return success or error
postconditions: new patient record created in patients data store

call_inputs.name: registration_data
call_inputs.description: Patient registration details including name, contact, etc.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

outputs.name: registration_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

global_vars.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

data_operations.description: Check uniqueness and store new patient record

acceptance_criteria.description: New patient record is created in patients data store

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details from input, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, and return confirmation
postconditions: new appointment record created in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: appointment_data
call_inputs.description: Appointment details including patient ID, date, time, doctor

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Check slot availability and store new appointment

outputs.name: booking_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

global_vars.description: Check slot availability and store new appointment

data_operations.description: Check slot availability and store new appointment

acceptance_criteria.description: New appointment record is created in appointments data store
Booking for non-existent patient returns error
Booking for already booked slot returns error

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID from input, verify patient exists, query appointments data store for all records, and return them

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Retrieve all records for the patient

outputs.name: records_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, list of records, and message

global_vars.description: Retrieve all records for the patient

data_operations.description: Retrieve all records for the patient

constraints.description: Patient must exist before retrieving records
Records are read-only, no modification allowed

acceptance_criteria.description: Records are returned for existing patient
Query for non-existent patient returns error

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields from input, verify patient exists, update patients data store, and return confirmation
postconditions: patient profile updated in patients data store

call_inputs.name: update_data
call_inputs.description: Patient ID and fields to update

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: Verify patient exists and update profile

outputs.name: update_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

global_vars.description: Verify patient exists and update profile

data_operations.description: Verify patient exists and update profile

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients data store
Update for non-existent patient returns error

children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Parse the input JSON to determine which command to execute
children.behavior: Extract the 'command' field from input JSON and return it along with the rest of the data
guarantees: command is one of the valid commands

constraints.description: Command must be one of: register, book, records, update

acceptance_criteria.description: Command and data are extracted from input

children.name: ValidateInput
children.purpose: Validate the input JSON structure and required fields
children.behavior: Check that input has required fields based on command, return validation result

call_inputs.name: input_data
call_inputs.description: Input data to validate (command and data)

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: JSON with valid boolean and optional error message

constraints.description: Required fields must be present based on command

acceptance_criteria.description: Invalid input returns valid=false with error message

children.name: FormatResponse
children.purpose: Format the output JSON with success, data, and message
children.behavior: Take the result from a child operation and wrap it in a standard response format

call_inputs.name: operation_result
call_inputs.description: Result from a child operation to format

constraints.description: Output must contain success, data, and message fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Output is formatted with success, data, message

governance_notes: Resource fields derived from internal_leaf_accesses. ParseCommand, ValidateInput, and FormatResponse have no data store access, so global_vars and data_operations are empty. RegisterPatient, BookAppointment, GetRecords, and UpdateProfile have global_vars and data_operations synchronized with their internal_leaf_accesses. Constraints and acceptance criteria are derived from preconditions, postconditions, and guarantees. Requested capabilities are derived from data_operations.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures from Stage 2 are preserved exactly. No changes to function names, parameters, or return types.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: internal_leaf_accesses map directly to global_vars and data_operations. For example, BookAppointment's internal_leaf_accesses to patients (read) and appointments (read_write) become global_vars and data_operations with the same resource names and operations.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: global_vars and data_operations are fully synchronized for all children. Each entry in global_vars has a corresponding entry in data_operations with the same resource, operation, and description. No exceptions needed.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources from internal_leaf_accesses are covered in global_vars and data_operations. No resources are missing or extra. The coverage is complete.
